title: contexts: use index type ids when registering metric types
description: After fixing duplicate converters, targeted context tests still fail because Context registers metric types with 	ype.GetType().GetHashCode() instead of the index type byte/id. This drives LongBackedBitArray.Set(...) with out-of-range positions during context construction.
